recentFeedback.feedback: Steven wants browser-based tools only, not local apps

lessonsLearned: All tools must be browser-accessible — Steven uses a different computer
Data in the dashboard > standalone tools
Fewer better entries > many mediocre ones
BBlocks-style thumbnails with bold text chips perform better
Series content outperforms one-offs — build tools that enable episodic planning
Investment intelligence widgets should surface actionable data with clear countdowns
Minecraft update trackers with content angles help prep for release day content
Shorts as trailers for long-form is a key 2026 trend — build tools that facilitate this workflow
BBS Mod cinematic content is underserved — opportunity for machinima storytelling
Marketplace creator earnings data helps creators understand earning potential and set goals
Minecraft Live countdowns build anticipation and prep content creators
